title: Gastrula_Nvectensis_scATAC-seq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cnj1l","text":"This protocol describes the steps for isolating single nuclei from gastrula-stage embryos of the cnidarian Nematostella vectensis for scATAC-seq using 10x Chromium platform. Nuclei are directly isolated and permeabilized by mechanically dissociating gastrula embryos in hypotonic OmniATAC lysis buffer1 supplemented with 70µM Pitstop2 to increase nucleus permeability to Tn52. After washing, nuclei are visually inspected under the microscope, counted, and tagmented in bulk prior to single-nucleus encapsulation using 10x Chromium platform. scATAC-seq libraries are then prepared according to manufacturer`s instructions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":107,"length":23},{"style":"sup","offset":301,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":374,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fowri","text":"Clean and cool down dounce homogenizer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":38}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wimnh","text":"Decontaminate dounce homogenizer right after each use by rinsing thoroughly with tap water to remove gross debris. Then, soak the tube and pestle in 10% bleach (freshly prepared) for 15min. Rinse 7-8 times with nuclease-free water to remove all traces of bleach, and one more time with 70% ethanol. Let the dounce homogenizer dry on a clean kimwipe inside a clean container (eg nuclease-free pipette tip box). Cool down the douncer at least 1h at 4 C before use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"zztus","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a9fim","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"lgrve","text":"Prepare all buffers and reagents as described in the \"Materials\" section and refrigerate a clean dounce homogenizer in advance. Work quickly, keeping buffers and samples on ice unless otherwise specified. Use protein LoBind tubes and a refrigerated centrifuge with a swinging-rotor to minimize cell loss throughout the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Collect 300 gastrula-stage embryos of N.vectensis into protein LoBind tube.
Wash with ice-cold 1xPBS . Remove as much PBS as possible before adding Lysis Buffer.
Add 300µL of ice-cold OmniATAC Lysis buffer and transfer embryos into 2 mL cold dounce homogenizer
Take an aliquot and determine the Nuclei Stock Concentration using DAPI counterstaining. Count nuclei with a hemocytometer under a fluorescence microscope.
Centrifuge nuclei suspension at 500xg for 5 min at 4 C using a swinging-bucket rotor to minimize cell loss (set break 1). Remove SN without disturbing nuclei pellet.

Gently ressuspend nuclei in 300µL of 1x Diluted Nuclei Buffer by pipetting up and down 5 times The volume of 1× diluted nuclei buffer to add depends on the expected yield of nuclei (based on the number and developmental stage of embryos dissociated) and should be adjusted to obtain aworking concentration suitable for the desired target number of nuclei for encapsulation on the 10x Chromium platform. Expect ~1.5 x 10 6 nuclei out of 300 gastrula-stage embryos.
Centrifuge nuclei at 500xg for 5 min at 4 C. Remove SN, carefully leaving ~10uL behind
Filter the homogenate through 40 µm cell strainer into 2mL protein LoBind tube.

Prepare at least 5ul (one reaction) of nuclei suspension at a concentration needed to encapsulate the target nuclei of interest. Accordingly to manufacturer's instructions (Next GEM, Chromium scATAC v1.1): Volume Nuclei Stock Concentration 1x Diluted Nuclei Buffer 1 Y (ul) = Target Nuclei Recovery X 1.53 / Nuclei Stock Concentration Z (ul)= 5ul - Y (ul) Gently mix Y (ul) of Nuclei Stock Concentration and Z (ul) of 1x Diluted Nuclei Buffer.
Proceed with your scATAC-seq experiment following manufacturer's instructions .
Gently homogenize the tissue using the dounce homogenizer with pestle A (~3-4strokes)
Gently homogenize the tissue using the dounce homogenizer with pestle B (~3-4strokes).

Further dissociate the homogenate by pipetting with a p1000 tip until a homogenous suspension is obtained. Dissociate in OmniATAC lysis buffer for 3min on ice Keep the dounce homogenizer on ice at all times and avoid bubble formation. The required number of strokes will vary depending on the amount of minced tissue and the applied force; the aim is to obtain a homogenous suspension.
Add 1mL of ice-cold PBS-1%BSA and flick the tube to resuspend the pellet
(OPTIONAL) Filter nuclei suspension through 40 µm Flowmi strainer if aggregates are present
creator: Marta Iglesias
